title: Add difficulty levels and defaults to manifest
description: Define L0-L4 difficulty scale and set defaults: focus on L0-L2 if unspecified; generate 10 questions if unspecified.

title: Quiz policy compliance audit
description:
# Quiz policy check report

This is a static check against the quiz authoring policy.
It does not execute runtime JS, so it checks what is authored in HTML.

- [ ] /Users/akira/toppymicroservices.github.io/education/quiz_finance_terms.html (fail: FAIL_EXPLAIN_TOO_SHORT, FAIL_NO_CONTEXT, FAIL_NO_OPTION_EXPLAIN, FAIL_NO_REAL_WORLD, FAIL_NO_RELATED, FAIL_NO_TERMS; warn: WARN_JA_PUNCTUATION, WARN_JA_PUNCTUATION_FILE)

title: Cleanup: decide scope for JA punctuation rule
description: We currently enforce 'no 。 / 、' in newly generated RFC JA quizzes, but older Japanese quizzes (e.g. finance/K terms) still contain these characters. Decide whether to (a) migrate all legacy JA quizzes to '.' and ',' mechanically, or (b) scope the rule to RFC drill pages only, and document the rule scope.

title: RFC drills: add quizzes + improve explanation rendering
RFC drills: add quizzes for RFC 8446 (TLS 1.3)
description: Create EN + JA quiz pages (5-15 questions) for RFC 8446. Keep questions scenario/concept-based (avoid RFC-number trivia). Enforce: no trailing '.' in choices; JA uses '.' and ',' (no '。' '、').

title: Rename CI workflow and avoid full_ci on workflow edits
description: Rename .github/workflows/ci.yml to build_and_test.yml and adjust full_ci path logic so .github/workflows/** changes don't trigger full_ci=true.

title: Remove YOLOZU version display
description: Stop displaying or injecting YOLOZU versions; use versionless PyPI links and remove runtime placeholder logic.

title: Add quiz answer reveal toggles
description: Add two switches to quiz_template_skeleton to control explanation visibility after answering and showing all answers/score; document behavior in manifest.json.

title: RFC drills: add quizzes for RFC 9000 (QUIC)
description: Create EN + JA quiz pages (5-15 questions) for RFC 9000. Focus on QUIC transport concepts (streams, connection IDs, loss recovery at high level, migration, 0-RTT tradeoffs) without requiring memorizing the RFC number. Follow quiz authoring constraints (choices no trailing '.'; JA punctuation '.' and ',' only).

title: Split quiz_template_skeleton into html/css/js
description: Extract inline scripts from education/quiz_template_skeleton.html into education/quiz_template_skeleton.js and add an optional education/quiz_template_skeleton.css; update HTML to reference them.

title: Document quiz explanation authoring rules
description: Add contentAuthoring requirements to manifest.json: follow theme/URLs, include question terms in explanations, explain all options, and provide related topic examples when relevant.
